overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Horizon Forbidden West depicting a tropical coastal landscape at golden hour. The clip opens with a scenic overlook of a turquoise bay from beneath a vine-covered outcrop, then transitions to follow the protagonist Aloy as she wades through shallow water along a sandy beach, exploring the shoreline dominated by a massive ancient arch bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical coastal overlook beneath vine-covered rock outcrop

events.description: red foliage briefly materializes on left side with particle glow effect
camera pans right revealing more of the coastline and distant structure

agents.ego_description: camera slowly drifts forward through hanging vines, surveying the tropical bay and distant ruins

entered.detail: thick green vines draping from rock overhang framing the view
vibrant blue-green water inlet surrounded by rocky cliffs
steep rock face with sparse vegetation rising from the water
cluster of tropical palm trees on the hillside
modern building with angular architecture perched on distant cliff

segments.scene_description: The segment opens from beneath a vine-covered rock overhang, looking out at a stunning turquoise bay. The camera drifts slowly forward through dense tropical vegetation, briefly revealing red glowing foliage on the left. The view encompasses palm trees, rocky cliffs, and a distant futuristic structure before panning right to show more of the coastline.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal shoreline with massive ancient arch bridge ruins

events.description: hard cut from scenic overlook to third-person view of Aloy standing in shallow ocean water
Aloy begins walking forward along the shoreline through the surf

agents.ego_description: Aloy wades through shallow turquoise water along the sandy beach, approaching and passing beneath a massive ruined arch bridge while surveying the coastline

notable_agents.action: Aloy walks steadily through shallow waves with bow and weapons visible on her back, occasionally looking around the environment

entered.detail: massive ancient stone and metal arch structure covered in vegetation spanning across the background
gentle white-capped waves lapping against the shore
white sand shoreline between the water and cliff base
small rocky outcrop visible in the ocean distance

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to follow Aloy from behind as she explores the shoreline at water level. She walks through crystal-clear turquoise waves along a white sand beach, passing beneath a massive ancient arch bridge that dominates the left side of the frame. The camera tracks her movement as she progresses along the coast, with the ruined bridge gradually receding into the background and the rocky cliffs now framing the left side of the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered tropical overlook into an expansive exploration of a sun-drenched shoreline. It begins beneath a vine-covered rock overhang, drifting slowly through dense vegetation and past glowing red foliage to reveal a wide vista of a turquoise bay and distant futuristic structures. As the perspective shifts downward to water level, the camera begins tracking Aloy from behind as she wades through crystal-clear waves along a white sand beach. The scene then expands to showcase a massive ancient arch bridge dominating the landscape, which gradually recedes into the background as she progresses. Finally, the view opens further along the coast, with towering rocky cliffs framing the left side of the frame under the golden light.
